title: AllSummaries
description: Output of the evidence-gathering step: per-entry summaries with exact quotes. Two source paths produce different field sets — source_method identifies which path was used. Only summary, quotes, and source_method are required in both paths. ASTA snippet path adds: source_corpus_id, source_title, section, snippet_score, ref_corpus_ids, depth. Full-text/supplement path adds: paper_doi, paper_title, authors, year, journal, topic.

summary.description: Narrative summary of the evidence relevant to the query.

quotes.description: Exact substrings of the source text supporting specific claims.

source_corpus_id.description: ASTA path: Semantic Scholar CorpusId of the source paper.

source_title.description: ASTA path: title of the source paper.

section.description: ASTA path: section of the paper the snippet is from.

snippet_score.description: ASTA path: relevance score from snippet_search.

ref_corpus_ids.description: ASTA path: CorpusIds of papers referenced within this snippet.

depth.description: ASTA path: traversal depth at which this snippet was found.

paper_doi.description: Full-text path: DOI of the source paper.

paper_title.description: Full-text path: title of the source paper.

authors.description: Full-text path: author string, e.g. 'Gopee NH et al.'

topic.description: Full-text path: the specific aspect of the cell type covered by this entry.
